content:
There are many issues with the current form of P-Dive, but this post will focus one: its insane difficulty.

In the current state of P-Dive, the recommended levels are very off. They might be accurate if it was about mob levels in arc2. However in arc2 you have access to Soulforge, which can give 25 levels worth of stats and an extra buff to the awakener's kit. There are some benefits to arc1 ruleset, but it doesn't nearly compensate for the lack of Soulforge.

I really hope P-Dive can be tuned down a lot so non-whales can enjoy it as well.

 I'll put 3 comparisons of P-Dive mobs below.
this comp has Tulu + Miryam meaning Tulu soulforge should've apply 10% tentacle vulnerable but here its only 1% <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
